business.name: M K DANIELS ELECTRIC
business.tagline: Reliable electrical work that gets it right the first time

hero.headline: Augusta's *straight-shooting* electrician
hero.subheadline: No sales pitch. No surprises. Just quality electrical work explained in plain English so you understand every wire.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, switch, and outlet — handled
services_section.subheading: From ceiling fans to panel upgrades, we explain what we're doing and why

services.title: Ceiling Fan Installation
services.description: Mount it right, wire it clean, test the remote. Your fan will run quiet and look sharp for years to come.

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Fix what's wrong without breaking the bank. We'll show you what caused the problem so it doesn't happen again.

services.title: Panel & Wiring Work
services.description: Upgrade old panels, fix bad wiring from previous jobs. We clean up other people's mistakes without talking trash.

services.title: Light Installation
services.description: Indoor, outdoor, fancy or simple. Proper mounting, clean connections, switches that work like they should.

about.heading: Straight talk, quality work
about.body: Mark Daniels has been solving Augusta's electrical problems with honest work and fair prices. No mystery charges, no unnecessary upsells — just the electrical work you need, done right the first time. We explain what we're doing so you understand your electrical system.

reviews.name: Ralph G.
reviews.text: Professional work at a fair price. Mark explained everything he was doing, which helped me understand my electrical system better. Fixed previous bad work without badmouthing anyone.

reviews.name: Nell A.
reviews.text: Called for ceiling fan installation. Arrived on time, got to work immediately. Very professional and the fan runs whisper quiet.

reviews.name: Michael M.
reviews.text: Quick service, excellent prices, great people. Definitely calling them for any future electrical needs.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Augusta and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the CSRA

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work done right?
cta.body: Call for a straight answer about your electrical needs. No pressure, no surprises — just honest pricing for quality work.
